message:
fix: resolve pre-existing test failures on main (gt-0qor20)

- formula/types.go: Add UnmarshalTOML to Var so it accepts both shorthand
  string syntax (wisp_type = "gc_report") and full table syntax, fixing
  TestParseRealFormulas/mol-wisp-compact.formula.toml TOML type mismatch
- util/orphan_test.go: Make TestIsInGasTownWorkspace environment-aware so
  it passes when run from inside a GT workspace (crew worktree)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
